title: Create New Booking Successfully
description: Verify that staff/admin can create a new booking with valid client, equipment, studio, dates, delivery options, and notes, triggering risk check and payment state.

steps.description: Login as staff/admin user
Navigate to new booking creation page
Select existing client
Add equipment items and/or studio and/or bundles to the booking
Choose valid start and end dates/times with proper setup/cleaning buffers
Select delivery options and add-ons
Fill in optional notes
Submit booking to the system
Verify booking is created in draft state
Verify risk check process is triggered
Verify payment pending state is set after risk check passes

title: Prevent Booking on Conflicting Equipment Availability
description: Booking creation should fail if selected equipment is not available for the requested dates due to overlapping bookings.

steps.description: Login as staff/admin user
Attempt to create booking with equipment already booked overlapping requested dates
Submit booking
Verify booking is rejected with conflict error message
Verify no booking record is created

title: Booking State Transitions Workflow
description: Verify the booking state machine enforces valid state transitions (draft -> risk check -> payment pending -> confirmed -> active -> returned -> closed -> cancelled) with side effects.

steps.description: Create booking in draft state
Trigger risk check transition
Booking state moves to payment pending if risk passes
Process payment transition
Booking state moves to confirmed on successful payment
Activate booking transition on check-out
Booking state moves to active
Process return and check-in booking transition
Booking state moves to returned and then closed on finalization
Cancel booking from allowed states
Booking state moves to cancelled

title: Equipment CRUD Operations
description: Verify full create, retrieve, update, and delete operations for equipment including condition updates and availability checks.

steps.description: Create new equipment with valid details, category, brand, condition, and media
Confirm equipment is created with correct attributes
Retrieve equipment by ID
Verify returned details match created data
Update equipment attributes including condition and activation status
Verify equipment details are updated accurately
Check equipment availability for a given time range
Verify correct availability status based on existing bookings
Delete equipment
Verify equipment is removed and no longer retrievable

title: Create and Manage Studio Bookings with Buffers
description: Verify hourly studio bookings allow setup and cleaning buffers properly, preventing conflicts.

steps.description: Attempt to create studio booking with valid time slots including setup and cleaning buffers
Booking succeeds without conflicts
Attempt overlapping studio booking violating buffer times
Booking is rejected due to buffer conflict

title: Process Payment and Refund Workflow
description: Verify payment processing, status updates, and refund handling through Tap Payment Gateway integration with webhook simulation.

steps.description: Initiate payment for booking deposit
Payment record created with pending status
Simulate successful payment webhook callback
Payment status updated to successful
Request refund for payment
Refund processed and payment status updated accordingly
Simulate failed payment webhook callback
Payment status updated to failed and booking state handled correctly

title: Invoice Generation and Compliance with ZATCA
description: Generate invoice for a booking including tax calculations, submit to ZATCA, and verify client notifications.

steps.description: Select confirmed booking for invoicing
Generate invoice with correct charges and tax compliance
Invoice created with accurate data including tax details
Submit invoice to ZATCA tax authority
Submission confirmed with no errors
Client receives invoice notification via email and WhatsApp

title: Contract Lifecycle Management with Electronic Signing
description: Verify contract creation, versioning, electronic signing, legal snapshot preservation, and immutable record enforcement.

steps.description: Create new rental contract linked to booking
Contract saved with accurate details and initial version
Update contract creating new version
Versioning reflected and previous versions immutable
Initiate electronic signing process
Legal snapshot of contract preserved at sign time
Complete contract signing
Contract status updated to signed and record immutable

title: Warehouse Equipment Check-out with Condition Assessment
description: Test warehouse equipment check-out flow including scanning booking, verifying items, assessing condition, and generating packing list.

steps.description: Login as warehouse staff
Scan booking ID for check-out
Verify all equipment items for the booking
Record equipment condition assessment
Generate packing list report
Confirm equipment check-out to transition booking to active
Booking state is updated to active

title: Maintenance Scheduling and Completion Workflow
description: Verify scheduling maintenance, assigning technicians, technician logging findings, updating equipment condition, and completing maintenance.

steps.description: Schedule maintenance for specified equipment and maintenance type
Assign technician to maintenance task
Technician logs findings and updates equipment condition
Technician marks maintenance as complete
Maintenance record shows completed status with details
Equipment condition reflects updates

title: Multi-language UI Display and RTL Support
description: Verify that UI correctly displays in Arabic (RTL), English, and Chinese with proper layout, text direction, and accessibility compliance.

steps.description: Set UI language to Arabic
Confirm UI layout adjusts to right-to-left orientation
All texts render in Arabic accurately
Set UI language to English
Confirm UI layout is left-to-right and texts are English
Set UI language to Chinese
Confirm UI layout is left-to-right and texts are Chinese
Verify keyboard accessibility and screen reader compatibility across languages

title: Role-Based Access Control Enforcement
description: Verify that user roles (admin, staff, client) have correct permissions for CRUD operations, state transitions, and access to sensitive data.

steps.description: Login as client and attempt to create a booking for another client
Access denied error received
Login as staff and attempt to approve booking state transition
Operation allowed if role has permission
Login as admin and perform full CRUD on clients and equipment
All operations succeed
Attempt unauthorized access to financial or contract resources
Access denied enforced

title: Audit Logging of Sensitive Operations
description: Verify that all sensitive operations including financial transactions, booking state changes, and approvals are logged with user identity and timestamp.

steps.description: Perform booking state transitions
Process payments and refunds
Update contract records
Check audit logs contain detailed records with user, timestamp, action, and before/after states

title: Feature Flags Enable/Disable System Modules
description: Verify feature toggles can enable or disable system modules or emergency modes without downtime and interface reflects changes.

steps.description: Admin enables a feature flag to disable booking module
Booking UI and APIs become inaccessible or show maintenance message
Admin disables feature flag to re-enable module
Booking functionality restores without restart
Enable emergency read-only mode
All write actions are blocked, read actions accessible

title: Admin Bulk Data Import with AI-Powered Enrichment and Validation
description: Verify import of bulk equipment data, validation of input files, AI enrichment of imported data, error handling, and progress tracking.

steps.description: Upload equipment import file with valid data
File validation passes with no errors
Trigger AI-powered data enrichment during import
Enrichment data added correctly
Submit import job
Import job processes and updates status accordingly
Upload invalid import file with missing mandatory fields
Validation fails with relevant errors
Retry a failed import job after fixing errors
Import job completes successfully

title: Notifications Delivery via Multiple Channels
description: Verify that booking, payment, maintenance, and delivery events trigger notifications via email, WhatsApp, SMS, and in-app channels correctly.

steps.description: Create booking and progress through states
Notification sent via configured channels for each event
Process payment and receive webhook
Payment confirmation notifications sent to client
Schedule maintenance and assign technician
Maintenance notifications sent to technician and admin
Schedule delivery and update status
Delivery status notifications sent to driver and client

title: Quote Creation, Status Tracking, and Conversion to Booking
description: Verify full lifecycle of quotes including creation, updating status, and conversion into bookings.

steps.description: Create new quote with customer and equipment details
Quote saved with correct initial status
Update quote status (e.g., approved, rejected)
Quote status updates reflected correctly
Convert approved quote to booking
Booking created with matching details from quote

title: Client Profile Management
description: Verify client CRUD operations and view permissions in client portal.

steps.description: Create new client via API or admin panel
Client details saved correctly
Update client contact and profile info
Updates persisted and visible
Delete client record
Client record no longer retrievable
Client user views own profile on portal
Client can view and edit permitted fields
